text.title: Recognition Over Recall Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the recognition-over-recall methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory
step.action: List every interactive element per screen with icon-only / labeled tag.

step.name: static-categorisation
step.action: Categorise candidates: icon-only / hidden-option / no-autocomplete / stale-recents / tooltip-too-long.
step.decision-gate: Drop findings where icon is in allowlist (severity-0 only).

step.name: cross-screen-audit
step.action: Walk multi-step flows; flag no-context-carry-over where prior selections vanish.
step.decision-gate: If audit_scope is static-wireframe, skip this category and emit a note in fix_direction.

step.name: severity-rate
step.action: Apply severity rubric: 3 = blocks task; 2 = high friction; 1 = minor; 0 = informational / allowlisted.

step.name: fix-direction-and-flag-review
step.action: Write concrete fix_direction per finding; run scripts/validate-recognition-over-recall.py; flag "ready for owner review".
